style: Small sapphire mana potion icon matching dark fantasy Image2 HUD materials. Matte black background.

ontology.clause: ONTOLOGY ACTIVE: potion icons must stay readable as quick actions and match the bottom HUD material language.

prompt: Create one small sapphire blue mana potion vial icon for a Diablo-like dark fantasy ARPG HUD. Tarnished brass cap, blackened iron accents, deep blue glass liquid, compact high readability. Matte black background, centered icon fills about 72% of canvas. No text, no number, no frame, no character, no watermark, no SVG, no flat vector.
acceptance: Sapphire potion vial icon on matte black background.
